positiveClaims: The explicit owner-selected release claim publication effect path is product-bound as one bounded main-only publication effect contour after delivered 12O.
Accepted 12P requires the command id cmd.project.releaseClaim.execute to remain on the command surface kernel allowlist.
Accepted 12P requires bus-route command surface dispatch; direct route bypass remains blocked.
Accepted 12P evaluates the delivered 12O real execution effect sublayer directly from raw command input before any publication effect write.
Accepted 12P emits a typed publication effect result with summary.publicationEffectOnly true and with no summary.witnessOnly or summary.ephemeralEffectOnly field.
Accepted 12P writes exactly one deterministic in-memory publication effect record keyed by packetId only when the bounded 12O result is accepted.
Accepted 12P keeps publication effect registry lifetime bounded to the current main-process lifetime only.
Accepted 12P blocks missing packetId before any publication effect record is written.
Accepted 12P blocks a second publication effect write for an already-recorded packetId with a deterministic duplicate-packet blocked publication-effect outcome.
Diagnostics or blocked 12O output writes no publication effect record.

At the real ui:command-bridge boundary, accepted 12P preserves the existing outer ok true value path while blocked or diagnostics publication effect output remains nested under the outer failure value field.
This contour proves one real bounded publication effect only; it does not prove product publication completion, publication authority, or release readiness.
nonClaims: No command availability is claimed.
No broad command execution completion is claimed.
No release execution completion is claimed.
No runtime queue semantics are claimed.
No retry, drop, abandon, or single-writer queue policy is claimed.
No product publication is claimed.
No publication authority is claimed.
No release publication completion is claimed.
No release readiness is claimed.
No user-facing release is claimed.
No renderer runtime trigger is introduced.
No UI state is changed.
No Word support is claimed.
No Google Docs support is claimed.
No DOCX support expansion is claimed.
No import support is claimed.
No export support is claimed.
No review import completion is claimed.
No roundtrip is claimed.
No layout parity is claimed.
No full fidelity is claimed.
No automatic apply is claimed.
No structural apply is claimed.
No comment auto-apply is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by release claim publication effect binding.
No project truth write is performed by release claim publication effect binding.
No storage write is performed by release claim publication effect binding.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by release claim publication effect binding.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud sync, cross-platform readiness, packaged readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Publication effect binding is main-only in-memory effect evidence.
Publication effect record is ephemeral in-memory state only and does not become project truth.
Publication effect registry lifetime is the current main-process lifetime only and is not replayed from storage.
Publication effect binding does not write manuscript truth or project truth.
Publication effect binding does not write storage truth and does not create receipt or recovery evidence.
Publication effect binding does not open runtime queue semantics.
Publication effect binding does not prove product publication completion.
Publication effect binding does not grant publication authority.
Publication effect binding uses a fixed execute-command-to-publication-effect mapping and does not trust inner free-form command ids as effect authority.
12O real execution ephemeral effect remains a delivered historical sublayer and is not rewritten by this contour.
12N command surface trigger witness remains upstream historical evidence and is not rewritten by this contour.
12K execution gate remains upstream proof-only evidence and is not mutated semantically by this contour.
USER_FACING_CLAIM_READY remains an internal chain class only, not a release readiness state.
USER_FACING is a chain surface in this contour, not a user-facing UI state.
This contour is not a product publication contour.

agentAudits.finding: Confirmed the narrowest honest opening after delivered 12O is one new downstream main-only publication-effect contour in main.js only, with a new status artifact and new binding contract, while keeping real product publication, publication authority, persistence, storage truth, manuscript truth, renderer authority, UI state, runtime queue semantics, import-export widening, and Y9 explicitly false.

nextStep: run publication-effect binding contract and governance checks, then complete delivery chain; real product publication, publication authority, and post-MVP import-export expansion do not open by implication
